lead_profile_text: Purchased specifically for STL. 3-bed house converting garage to bedroom + loft conversion. Final configuration: 5 bedrooms, 2 toilets. Renovation timeline 2-3 months. All work fire-compliant for Airbnb. Professional/academic guest profile preferred. Target £1,000+/month profit after mortgage.
emotional_profile: Motivated and financially analytical. Clear income target with a specific gap to close. Renovation-dependent timeline. Prefers professional and academic guests. Measured optimism with realistic expectations.
delay_trigger_phrases: I'll complete the renovation over the next 2-3 months
delay_timeline: August/September 2026 (renovation completion); follow-up call 10 August 2026 at 12pm
green_light_types: Bought specifically for STL — no inertia from existing use
Follow-up call booked August 10 at 12pm via Google Meet
100/100 direct booking potential score landed positively
Fire-compliant renovation already planned for Airbnb regulations
green_light_trigger_phrases: My target is £1,000+ monthly profit after mortgage
I want to get the right type of guests
I'll complete the renovation over the next 2-3 months
Fire doors and interlinked alarms — all fire-compliant

top_objections.text: Year 1 projection of ~£800/month after mortgage falls short of his £1,000 target
top_objections.zac_response: Year 1 is conservative — 5-bed will sit in premium bracket above the 4-bed comparable used in analysis. Year 2 trajectory with direct bookings (30-40%) bridges the gap. ADR premium for 5-bed to be modelled at August call.

top_objections.text: Interest in ensuring the right type of guests — professional and academic profile preferred
top_objections.zac_response: Coventry's proximity to university and hospital drives professional and academic guest base naturally. Guest screening with ID checks and £200 deposit in place.

top_objections.text: Renovation timeline dependency — cannot commit fully until renovation confirmed on track
top_objections.zac_response: August 10th follow-up call timed for renovation near-completion. No pressure to commit before then.

top_questions.text: What is the projected monthly revenue for the property?
top_questions.answer: Conservative estimate based on 4-bed comparison: £1,805 net monthly. 58% occupancy, £196 average daily rate. Seasonal range: January £1,329 to July £2,284. 5-bed configuration will sit in premium bracket above these figures.
15% + VAT standard. No special offer made at this meeting.

top_questions.text: What type of guests can I expect?
top_questions.answer: Near University of Coventry and Coventry University Hospital — strong professional and academic guest base. 2,000+ annual events in Coventry. Guest screening with ID checks and £200 security deposit.

top_questions.text: What platforms will the property be listed on?
top_questions.answer: Airbnb, Booking.com, and Stayful direct booking site. 100/100 score for direct booking potential in Coventry.

top_questions.text: What services are included in management?
top_questions.answer: Full guest communication, cleaning and maintenance coordination, monthly statements 1st-5th, Slack communication with 24-hour response, quarterly performance review calls, £100k damage insurance per stay.

top_questions.text: What is the direct booking potential and how long does it take?
top_questions.answer: 100/100 score for direct booking potential. 30-40% direct bookings typical within 12-18 months — this is where the £1,000/month target becomes achievable.

top_questions.text: Can you help with furnishing and setup?
top_questions.answer: Setup assistance available including furnishing guidance and professional photography coordination.

what_moved_them: Market conditions described as highly favourable — competition averaging only 4.5 stars with 36 reviews
Coventry's proximity to university and hospital — aligns with his preferred professional guest profile
Full guest communication and maintenance coordination included — nothing for him to manage
what_fell_flat: Year 1 income projection (~£800 after mortgage) did not meet his £1,000 target — left an unresolved gap
No offer or incentive — no urgency lever created

conversion_gaps.gap: £800 vs £1,000/month gap after mortgage in Year 1 projection
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Present 5-bed ADR premium vs 4-bed comparable at August call. Model Year 2 trajectory with direct booking ramp. Show monthly peaks (August £2,284) clearly.

conversion_gaps.gap: Renovation completion confirmation needed before commitment can progress
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: August 10th call — confirm renovation on track, re-run figures with 5-bed config, move to contract if confirmed.

conversion_gaps.gap: No offer or incentive created at meeting — no urgency lever
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Consider time-sensitive offer at August 10th call if renovation is confirmed — e.g. reduced rate for early sign before busy autumn season.

zac_income_intro: Conservative estimate based on 4-bed comparison: £1,805 net monthly, 58% occupancy. 5-bed configuration sits in premium bracket — Year 2 with direct bookings makes the £1,000+ target very achievable.
